message:
fix(clippy): apply linter-suggested idioms across 16 modules

Replace collect-then-assert patterns with .any()/.count()/.all(),
add #[allow(clippy::float_cmp)] on test modules with exact float
comparisons, use .mul_add() for fused multiply-add, use .div_ceil()
for ceiling division, use iterator enumerate+take patterns, and
simplify should_panic attributes with expected messages.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -755,7 +755,7 @@ mod tests {
                 reflex_id: i as u64,
                 cluster_id: "c".to_string(),
                 version: 1,
-                status: status.clone(),
+                status: *status,
                 tier: MaturityTier::Incubating,
                 successes: 0,
                 failures: 0,
